name: analytics-copilot
description: Product 2: Governed Text-to-SQL Analytics Copilot. Users ask questions in natural language and receive trusted SQL-backed answers with zero hallucinations. Features a chat-like interface, SQL transparency toggle, and governance layer that restricts access by role. Frontend on Next.js (port 3001), backend API on port 8001. UI designed in Stitch, conversion tested via paywallexperiments.com.
